title: Quick Actions
description: Jump between views, change showcase states, and run common actions with keywords.

home.title: Go to Home
home.description: View the home overview, reminder, and this week's stats.

practice.title: Go to Practice
practice.description: Open the live practice dashboard and transcript screen.

report.title: Go to Report
report.description: Review the report overview, issue jumps, and share card.

history.title: Go to History
history.description: Browse historical trends and the practice list.

settings.title: Go to Settings
settings.description: Adjust presets, practice goals, and detection rules.

demoStart.title: Start Full Demo
demoStart.description: Play the complete app walkthrough immediately.

demoStop.title: Stop Full Demo
demoStop.description: Stop the full app walkthrough that is currently playing.

presentationOn.title: Enter Presentation Mode
presentationOn.description: Switch to a cleaner showcase layout and hide the top toolbar.

presentationOff.title: Exit Presentation Mode
presentationOff.description: Return to the standard showcase layout and restore the top toolbar.

fullscreenOn.title: Enter Fullscreen
fullscreenOn.description: Use the browser Fullscreen API for a true fullscreen presentation.

fullscreenOff.title: Exit Fullscreen
fullscreenOff.description: Leave the browser fullscreen presentation state.

annotationsShow.title: Show Notes Panel
annotationsShow.description: Toggle the notes panel for cleaner presentation or guided walkthroughs.

annotationsHide.title: Hide Notes Panel
annotationsHide.description: Toggle the notes panel for cleaner presentation or guided walkthroughs.

loadMock.title: Load Mock Data
loadMock.description: Quickly fill the Home, Report, and History screens with showcase data.

capture.title: Capture / Clean Export
capture.description: Open the PNG export panel for showcase, clean presentation, or phone-only layouts.

copyLink.title: Copy Current View Link
copyLink.description: Copy the current screen, theme, and showcase state as a permalink.

themeLight.title: Switch to Light Theme
themeLight.description: Change the current website presentation theme.

themeDark.title: Switch to Dark Theme
themeDark.description: Change the current website presentation theme.

designStory.title: Open Design Story / About
designStory.description: Review the product concept, author info, and technical details.

reset.title: Reset Prototype
reset.description: Clear current data and showcase state, then return to a clean home screen.
